text:
There once was a little mouse named Oliver.

Oliver was an orphan. Ornaments littered his tiny oak tree home. They sparkled with dandelions.

One day, as he nibbled oats left owl owl owl.

A giant owl flew down...

WooOOOOOOOV OH OW OWOWOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOWOOOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOOOOOOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOOOOOOOOOVOVOOOOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOROVOUOOVOWLOWOOOOOOOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOVOV%).

Suddenly feathers flutter.

Owl switches gaze...

An owl owl owl...

A hare hops by.

It's Nancy!

"Oh my stars!" exclawks.
